info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: SrIRAti pAke SrIRIte sevAyAM Srayate Srayet ' (Slo. 16) - devaH

upasarga_meanings.meaning: ASraya karanA samIpa jAnA yA rahanA
viSvAsa karanA BarosA raKanA sAzwAMga namaskAra karanA jamIna para giranA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'ayaM tu prakftyudDato rAmaH kaTamitTamatipraSrayate' (bA॰rA॰4) atipraSrayate'tivinIto Bavati atinamro vartata iti yAvat
'pratyudgamapraSrayaRABivAdanam' (BA॰pu॰4.3.22) praSrayo vinayaH tadarSanam
'janayati Kalu rozaM praSrayo BidyamAnaH' (cAru॰1.14) praSrayaH=vinayaH praRayaH prArTanA vijYApanA

'tacClokakUwamadyApi graTitaM sudfQaM mune BettuM na Sakyate'rTasya gUQatvAt praSritasya ca' (BA॰Adi॰1.82) prameyeRa svaprakASArTaM SritaM SabdapramARaM tasyApi gORyAdivfttiBedena gUQatvam (iti nIlakaRWaH)
'bahuprakAraM DarmajYaH praSritaM praSritAYjaliH' (rA॰3.61.31) praSritaM vinItam
niBftavinItapraSritAH samA ityamaraH praSritAYjaliH=badDAYjaliH
'taddarSanopAstikatA nityaM tadBAvaBAvitA tatkAritA praSrayitA vfttaM saMSrayiRAM smftam' (kA॰nI॰sA॰11.28).. saMSrayiRaH=ASritAH praSrayitA sAdaratA praSrayo'syAstIti praSrayI tasya BAvaH praSrayitA
'aTEnaM prAYcaM praSritya visrasya rAjAnaM grAvARamupAMSusavanamaBi mimIte' (bO0 SrO0 75) praSritya niDAya
'anapaSritaH' (Apa॰Da॰1.2.6.17) kuqyAdyanASrita ityAha
'naktamAsIta saMSritaH' (lO॰gf॰5.4) ityapaSrita ityevamarTApayata AdityadarSanaH
'icCannaSvasya yacCiraH parvatezvapaSritam' (aTarva॰20.41.2) nilInam ityarTaH
'sa etasminnanne'paSrito BAti' (Sa॰brA॰1.5.2.19) apaSrito nilInaH (?)

'ezo apaSrito valo gomatImava tizWati' (f0 82430) apaSritaH kftaprasTAnaH anyatra dUre saMSrayaM gataH nilIna iti vA sAyaRastu apaSritaH sarvErASritaH vivftadvAro vetyAha iyaM cAsati kuqye citramivAnAlambanA samutprekzA BAzyakArasya sarvASritatvamapaSabdo virunDe vivftadvAratAM ca na samarTayate vipUrvaH Srayati rvivaraRe SrUyate nApapUrvaH
'icCannaSvasya yacCiraH parvatezvapaSritam' (tE0 brA0 1581) apaSritaM nilInam
